_comment: Rally Roadbook Creator — Custom Icon Library Extension
_description: Add custom icons here. They will be merged with the built-in icon set.
_howto: Each icon needs: id (unique), name, description, l1 (level1), l2 (level2), l3 (level3), svgContent (SVG markup for 32×32 viewBox)

icons.name: KM Marker
icons.svgContent: <rect x='13' y='4' width='6' height='20' fill='#e74c3c' rx='1'/><rect x='6' y='8' width='20' height='10' fill='#e74c3c' rx='2'/><rect x='7' y='9' width='18' height='8' fill='white'/><text x='16' y='16' text-anchor='middle' font-size='7' fill='#e74c3c' font-weight='bold'>KM</text>

icons.name: Photo Point
icons.svgContent: <rect x='4' y='8' width='24' height='18' rx='3' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><circle cx='16' cy='17' r='5' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><circle cx='16' cy='17' r='2' fill='#3498db'/><rect x='11' y='6' width='10' height='4' rx='1' fill='#3498db'/>

icons.name: Bridge
icons.svgContent: <path d='M4 20 L28 20' stroke='#7f8c8d' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M8 20 L8 12 Q16 8 24 12 L24 20' stroke='#7f8c8d' stroke-width='2' fill='rgba(127,140,141,0.2)'/><path d='M4 22 L28 22' stroke='#555' stroke-width='1.5'/>
